## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] test (new or updated tests)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)
- [ ] refactor (non-functional code change)

## Validation

- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] npm test
- [ ] Manually validated extension behavior (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the project coding conventions
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I did not include secrets or credentials

Issue: #
